response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Phonetically verified vocalizing (02:19-02:34) and initial lyrics match the Reference JSON for 'あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです。'. 2. Confirmed on-screen text at 02:20 validates the song choice. 3. Subtitles for the intro sequence (01:13-02:01) follow the on-screen text exactly as per Priority 2. 4. Timing is strictly tied to vocal audio activation, with discrete blocks for stylized vocalizations to ensure no early cutoffs.

subtitles.original: The night shines brighter when she sings...
subtitles.english: The night shines brighter when she sings...

subtitles.original: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink
subtitles.english: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink

subtitles.original: The moment we've all been waiting for...
subtitles.english: The moment we've all been waiting for...

subtitles.original: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...
subtitles.english: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...

subtitles.original: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...
subtitles.english: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...

subtitles.original: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...
subtitles.english: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...

subtitles.original: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...
subtitles.english: Ha-ah... uh-uh-uh-ah...

subtitles.original: こんなことになんなんて
subtitles.english: That things would end up like this...

subtitles.original: 会う前には分かってたら
subtitles.english: If only I'd known before we met,

subtitles.original: もう少しだけしゃんとした僕を
subtitles.english: then maybe I could have shown you...

subtitles.original: 見せられたはずなんだ
subtitles.english: a slightly more composed version of myself.

subtitles.original: 「どうしたらいいのかな」なんて
subtitles.english: "What should I do?"

subtitles.original: 頭では分かってるけど
subtitles.english: I know the answer in my head, but...

subtitles.original: 何気ないちょっとした言葉で
subtitles.english: With just a few casual words...

subtitles.original: Wow oh
subtitles.english: Wow oh

subtitles.original: 嬉し顔が出ちゃって
subtitles.english: A happy look escapes my face.

subtitles.original: こんなバレバレじゃ格好悪いな
subtitles.english: It's embarrassing how obvious I am.

subtitles.original: けどこのままじゃ引き下がれないよな
subtitles.english: But I can't just back down like this.

subtitles.original: 今も顔が照れくさくて
subtitles.english: Even now, my face is turning red...

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです
subtitles.english: I can't say that I'm in love with you.

subtitles.original: この気持ち伝わるから
subtitles.english: Since these feelings will reach you,

subtitles.original: 嫌いだってキャラ回り
subtitles.english: I act like I hate you instead,

subtitles.original: 何も言えず またさよなら
subtitles.english: and with nothing said, it's goodbye again.

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないんです
subtitles.english: I love you so much I can't stand it.

subtitles.original: 明日こそは言えるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I can say it tomorrow.

subtitles.original: あなたも僕に同じように
subtitles.english: I wonder if you're also

subtitles.original: 恋してたらなんて考えちゃうんだ
subtitles.english: in love with me, the same way...

subtitles.original: 会えない日が続いてる
subtitles.english: The days we can't meet keep going on.

subtitles.original: このままじゃよろしくない
subtitles.english: It's not good to leave things like this.

subtitles.original: 会ったところで何ができるって
subtitles.english: It's not like I can do much

subtitles.original: わけじゃないんだけど
subtitles.english: even if we did meet, but...

subtitles.original: こんな恋は二度とないな
subtitles.english: A love like this will never happen again.

subtitles.original: 頭では分かってるけど
subtitles.english: I know that in my head, but...

subtitles.original: 眩しすぎるその笑顔が
subtitles.english: That smile of yours is so dazzling...

subtitles.original: Wow oh
subtitles.english: Wow oh

subtitles.original: 僕を焦らせるんだ
subtitles.english: It makes me so restless.

subtitles.original: ずっと見ていたくなるような
subtitles.english: The kind I want to keep looking at forever,

subtitles.original: 目そらしたくなってしまうよな
subtitles.english: but also makes me want to look away.

subtitles.original: こんな気持ち分かるのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you'd understand this feeling.

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってるなら それでいいんです
subtitles.english: As long as you're laughing, that's enough.

subtitles.original: でも隣は僕がいいな
subtitles.english: But I wish I was the one by your side.

subtitles.original: もしかしたら実は ずっと
subtitles.english: Maybe, actually, all this time...

subtitles.original: 気付いてるんじゃないかな
subtitles.english: you've already noticed, haven't you?

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないんです
subtitles.english: I love you so much I can't stand it.

subtitles.original: 明日こそは
subtitles.english: Tomorrow, for sure...
